_doc: Historical record of DDG-scrape files that did NOT make it into labels.json, with reasons. Files themselves were deleted from ddg_scrape/ and ddg_app_sized/ on 2026-04-20 (user: 'Lets only save the valid receipts, and delete the rest'). Kept as reference for future scrape iterations — use the reasons below to tune BLOCK_HOST_RE / query terms in scripts/scrape-ddg-receipts.js.

skipped.reason: Marketing graphic (AMC/Aloft ADMIT ONE styled design), not a transaction
Etsy/DocsByBud Ozark Auto Repair invoice template
Canva auto-repair-invoice blank template
Blank Estimate of Auto Repairs form template
Blank YOUR COMPANY NAME tow-truck repair-form template
Truncated — no date, no total visible; pixFueler watermark
Sarawak Energy bill with red SAMPLE stamp (specimen)
Sample MI Gas Utilities bill — JOHN Q CUSTOMER + numbered section-key diagram overlay
shotempl.com / gotempl.com ConEdison template (JOHN CITIZEN placeholder)
Chic Cuts Hair Studio invoice template (LOGO placeholder + Jane Doe sample data)
Beauty Salon invoice template with Lorem Ipsum filler text and $00,00 placeholder amounts
Blank Hotel Receipt template with decorative scratch borders
Blank Hotel Name template with Item 3/4/5 placeholders and '$' placeholder amounts
Receipt photographed at store-aisle distance — line items and totals not legibly readable
Multi-invoice/exchange receipt with multiple subtotals that do not reconcile cleanly; total is ambiguous between $167.22 Balance Due and $262.51 M/C authorized
Bottom of receipt cut off — only Mens Belts $32.00 line visible, no subtotal/tax/total
Receipt photographed mid-frame against product packaging; only first 2 line items visible, no subtotal or total
Appears to be a sample/marketing bill image — account & invoice numbers are 123456789 placeholders and a circled '3' callout matches the style of educational annotated samples
Photo-finishing pickup receipt with $0.00 total — zero-value edge case with no clean category; not useful for harness scoring
Tiny photo of receipt on carpet — all line items, subtotal, and total are illegible at this resolution
